# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 2. Vehicle Verifiers [11300 - 11312]
##### § 11300

It shall be unlawful for any person to act as a vehicle verifier without first having procured a vehicle verifier’s permit issued by the department, or when such permit has been canceled, suspended, revoked or invalidated.

*(Added by Stats. 1975, Ch. 700.)*

subsections.text: It shall be unlawful for any person to act as a vehicle verifier without first having procured a vehicle verifier’s permit issued by the department, or when such permit has been canceled, suspended, revoked or invalidated.
